title: Tramontina 3L Pedal Bin – Stainless Steel Bathroom Bin with Lid, 17 cm Diameter x 27 cm Height, 94538103
features: PERFECT FOR COMPACT SPACES: This ultra-compact 3-litre small pedal bin is ideal for toilets, en-suites, or under-sink waste disposal. A discreet and stylish small bin for managing everyday bathroom waste in tight areas.
DURABLE STAINLESS STEEL: Made from polished stainless steel, this bathroom bin with lid is built for daily use in small spaces. A handy carry handle makes it easy to move and empty.
HANDS-FREE MECHANISM: This pedal bin features a smooth foot pedal for hygienic, hands-free use. The secure-fit lid helps contain odours, making it a great choice for small bathrooms or guest toilets.
STAY-OPEN LID: This compact bin with lid features a stay-open function for longer tasks like cleaning or changing liners, while its smooth interior surface is easy to wipe clean.

NON-SLIP BASE AND COMPACT DESIGN: The non-slip base keeps this small bathroom bin stable on hard floors. Whether used as a sanitary bin, waste paper bin, or under sink bin, it’s designed for convenience in even the smallest spaces.
description: Product Description Tramontina 3L Pedal Bin – Compact Stainless Steel Bin with Lid for Bathrooms and Small Spaces The Tramontina 3-litre small bin is a discreet and practical choice for waste disposal in guest bathrooms, under sinks, bedrooms, or other compact spaces. Its sleek stainless steel design and compact size make it a stylish addition to modern interiors. This small pedal bin is made from corrosion-resistant stainless steel and features a reliable foot pedal for hands-free operation. The secure-fit lid helps contain odours, making it ideal as a small bathroom bin. Designed for convenience, this compact bin features a stay-open lid that’s ideal for clean-ups or changing liners. The smooth stainless steel interior is easy to wipe clean, helping you maintain a hygienic space with minimal effort. A non-slip base keeps the bin stable on hard floors, while the built-in handle makes it easy to move around. Whether used as a waste paper bin, under sink bin, or compact bathroom bin, Tramontina’s 3L bin delivers reliable performance in a space-saving design. KEY FEATURES Size: 3 Litre Dimension: Ø 17 cm x 27 cm height Recommended bin liner: 3.0l Material: AISI 430 polished stainless steel Pedal touch Handle: Stainless steel Non-slip base Made in Brazil Tramontina 3 Litre Pedal Bin Tramontina 5 Litre Pedal Bin Tramontina 12 Litre Pedal Bin Tramontina 20 Litre Pedal Bin Tramontina 30 Litre Pedal Bin Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.3 out of 5 stars 9,263 4.3 out of 5 stars 9,263 4.3 out of 5 stars 9,263 4.3 out of 5 stars 9,263 4.3 out of 5 stars 9,263 Price £17.99 £ 17 . 99 £24.99 £ 24 . 99 £24.99 £ 24 . 99 £39.99 £ 39 . 99 £41.99 £ 41 . 99 Capacity 3.0l 5.0l 12.0l 20.0l 30.0l Diameter Ø 17 cm Ø 20.5 cm Ø 25.5 cm Ø 29.5 cm Ø 29.5 cm Height 27 cm 29 cm 40 cm 46 cm 65.5 cm Recommended bin liner 3.0l 5.0l 10 - 12l 20 - 30l 20 - 30l Removable bucket No No ✓ ✓ ✓ Product weight 0.84 kg 1.11 kg 1.97 kg 2.63 kg 3.65 kg Non-Slip ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Quality products since 1911 Founded in 1911, Tramontina started as a small iron mill in southern Brazil. The company currently has one of the largest industrial parks in Brazil with 10 factories aimed in the most varied segments – cookware, tableware, knives, barbecue grill accessories, stainless steel utensils. Tramontina has a strong presence in Brazil and has reached over 120 countries. In total, there are 15 units abroad, including a distribution center in UK. Along with the renowned dishwasher safe steak knives, Tramontina is now including some new additions to the portfolio, as coffee and tea glasses, roasting pans, kitchen utensils sets, stainless steel cookware and cutlery.
